sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47089" key="h(mie/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμι-έτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔτος</etym>) <sense id="n47089.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of half a year</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡμιέτες, καὶ ἡ. χρόνος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:54" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.54</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
